headline: Experienced Advisor with More Than $120 Million in Assets Joins Ameriprise Financial for Independence and Growth Opportunities
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, June 09, 2026--Private wealth advisor Russell Austin recently joined the independent channel of Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) from Edward Jones in Spartanburg, S.C., where he managed more than $120 million in client assets. His practice, Freedom Ridge Private Wealth, includes client relationship manager Pamela Jones.
